Happy/feel-good. Only need 1. Top picks: Pitbull Time of Our Lives (26), Happy Together (58), Wham Wake Me Up (28), Feel Good Inc (42), Feel It Still (94). Plenty of fits.

Wants experimental Lil Wayne. Rank 28 'I'll Die For You' from Rebirth (his rock/experimental album) is the strongest exact-vibe fit; 38 God Bless Amerika (IANAHB II); 29 The Real Her (Wayne verse, moody); 44 Love U Better as backup. Found enough.

Exact requested track is 'Song for Jolee' (Silverthorn track 5) - NOT present in candidates (all are pre-Silverthorn Kamelot/Black Halo). Backfilled with Kamelot ballads/emotional tracks (Farewell, Memento Mori, March of Mephisto, Abandoned) plus other Kamelot album cuts to reach 17.

Found enough.
